Name: Opening
ShortDescription: The player survives the descent event and witnesses their first miracle.

Name: Egypt
ShortDescription: A solar temple archive hides the machine oracle called the Radiant Voice.

Name: Greece
ShortDescription: A storm-linked ruler stages divinity through prophecy, spectacle, and noble pressure.

Name: ItalicWest
ShortDescription: A bronze lawgiver shapes settlement, ritual roads, and the first civic order.

Name: Convergence
ShortDescription: All regional truths converge around the buried descent apparatus and the player's final identity.
